description: Inbound Meter Data Notification (MDN) carrying NEM12 interval data at 30-minute intervals (48 values per 300 record). Matches the plain MDP header shape used by DNSP-style metering providers (e.g. POWERMDP -> SPARQ): no <From description='...'> attribute, no <SecurityContext>, ParticipantRole/Role=FRMP. Use this template when the objective mentions 30-minute reads, multi-NMI batches, or MDPs whose B2B header omits descriptions.

CsvIntervalData.description: NEM12 interval-CSV body embedded in <CSVIntervalData>. Emit the raw CSV (no XML wrapping). Grammar, in order: one 100 header, then one or more 200 datastream blocks, each with one or more 300 day-of-interval records and optional 400/500 trailers, terminated by a single 900. Record formats (comma-separated): 100,NEM12,YYYYMMDDHHMM,<From>,<To> (5 fields). 200,<NMI>,<NMIConfig>,<RegisterID>,<NMISuffix>,<MDMDataStreamId>,<MeterSerial>,<UOM>,<IntervalLength>,<NextScheduledReadDate> (10 fields; IntervalLength MUST be 30 for this template). 300,<YYYYMMDD>,<48 interval values>,<QualityMethod>,<ReasonCode>,<ReasonDescription>,<UpdateDateTime>,<MSATSLoadDateTime> (total 55 fields; interval values numeric or blank; QualityMethod is one of A|E|F|N|S|V, optionally suffixed with a 2-3 digit reason code e.g. S51, F58). 400,<StartInterval>,<EndInterval>,<QualityMethod>,<ReasonCode>,<ReasonDescription> (6 fields; 1 <= start <= end <= 48). 500,<ReadType>,<MDMDataStreamId>,<MeterReadDateTime>,<MeterRegisterReadValue> (5 fields). 900 (1 field). Trailing commas are preserved and ARE significant to the field count. Do NOT wrap in CDATA. Do NOT insert XML entities; the renderer escapes <, >, & automatically.
